description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a striking pink, white, and black digital camouflage pattern covering the slide and extended magazine. The frame is primarily matte gray with black accents on the grip, trigger, and safety lever. The grip is ergonomically contoured and features a smooth, slightly textured surface for secure handling. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and control. The barrel is extended and ported, with visible holes near the muzzle for recoil compensation. No visible manufacturer markings or serial numbers are present on the slide, giving the weapon a clean, modern appearance.
description: A modern semi-automatic handgun with a pink digital camo slide and extended magazine, matte gray frame, and black ergonomic grip. Features an extended, ported barrel and a robust trigger guard.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the muzzle end, highlighting the ported barrel and the symmetry of the slide and magazine.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full digital camo pattern, extended magazine, ergonomic grip, and the ported barrel.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the slide, the grip's contour, and the alignment of the magazine with the frame.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the slide, magazine, and grip details, mirroring the left but with the safety lever and slide stop more visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a smooth, slightly matte black finish, providing a comfortable and secure hold. It features subtle texturing for improved traction, with gentle finger grooves molded into the lower portion for enhanced ergonomics. The backstrap is slightly arched, and the sides are flat, offering a modern, streamlined appearance. No visible logos or embellishments are present, emphasizing a clean and functional design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a generous opening for finger access. It has a smooth, matte finish and moderate thickness, providing structural strength. The lower edge is slightly undercut to allow for a higher grip, and there are no visible texturing or accessory rails integrated into the guard.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is extended and ported, with a series of holes near the muzzle to reduce recoil. It has a matte black finish that matches the slide, and the porting is cleanly machined. No external threads or suppressor attachments are visible, and the barrel profile is straight and uniform.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The slide is adorned only with the digital camouflage pattern, giving it a sleek and unbranded appearance.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is extended and flat, following the same digital camouflage pattern as the magazine body. It is rectangular with slightly beveled edges for easier insertion and removal, and there are no finger rests, logos, or additional texturing visible.
